l001.title: Nothing I see in this room means anything.

l002.title:
I have given everything I see all the meaning
  that it has for me.

l003.title: I do not understand anything I see in this room.

l004.title: These thoughts do not mean anything.

l005.title: I am never upset for the reason I think.

l006.title: I am upset because I see something that is not there.

l008.title: My mind is preoccupied with past thoughts.

l009.title: I see nothing as it is now.

l010.title: My thoughts do not mean anything.

l011.title:
My meaningless thoughts are showing
  me a meaningless world.

l012.title: I am upset because I see a meaningless world.

l014.title: God did not create a meaningless world

l015.title: My thoughts are images which I have made.

l018.title:
I am not alone in experiencing
  the effects of my seeing.

l019.title: I am not alone in experiencing the effects of my thoughts.

l021.title: I am determined to see things differently.

l022.title: What I see is a form of vengeance.

l023.title:
I can escape from the world I see
  by giving up attack thoughts.

l024.title: I do not perceive my own best interests.

l025.title: I do not know what anything is for.

l026.title: My attack thoughts are attacking my invulnerability.

l027.title: Above all else I want to see.

l028.title: Above all else I want to see things differently.

l029.title: God is in everything I see.

l030.title: God is in everything I see because God is in my mind.

l031.title: I am not the victim of the world I see.

l032.title: I have invented the world I see.

l033.title: There is another way of looking at the world.

l034.title: I could see peace instead of this.

l035.title: My mind is part of God’s. I am very holy.

l036.title: My holiness envelops everything I see.

l038.title: There is nothing my holiness cannot do.

l040.title: I am blessed as a Son of God.

l041.title: God goes with me wherever I go.

l042.title: God is my strength. Vision is His gift.

l043.title: God is my Source. I cannot see apart from Him.

l044.title: God is the Light in which I see.

l045.title: God is the Mind with which I think.

l046.title: God is the Love in which I forgive.

l047.title: God is the Strength in which I trust.

l049.title: God’s Voice speaks to me all through the day.

l050.title: I am sustained by the Love of God.

l061.title: I am the light of the world.

l062.title: Forgiveness is my function as the light of the world.

l063.title:
The light of the world brings peace to
  every mind through my forgiveness.

l064.title: Let me not forget my function.

l065.title: My only function is the one God gave me.

l066.title: My happiness and my function are one.

l069.title: My grievances hide the light of the world in me.

l071.title: Only God’s plan for salvation will work.

l072.title:
Holding grievances is an attack on God’s
  plan for salvation.

l074.title: There is no will but God’s.

l076.title: I am under no laws but God’s.

l079.title: Let me recognize the problem so it can be solved.

l080.title: Let me recognize my problems have been solved.

l092.title: Miracles are seen in light, and light and strength are one.

l093.title: Light and joy and peace abide in me.

l094.title: I am as God created me.

l095.title: I am One Self, united with my Creator.

l096.title: Salvation comes from my One Self.

l098.title: I will accept my part in God’s plan for salvation.

l099.title: Salvation is my only function here.

l100.title: My part is essential to God’s plan for salvation.

l101.title: God’s Will for me is perfect happiness.

l102.title: I share God’s Will for happiness for me.

l103.title: God, being Love, is also happiness.

l104.title: I seek but what belongs to me in truth.

l105.title: God’s peace and joy are mine.

l106.title: Let me be still and listen to the truth.

l107.title: Truth will correct all errors in my mind.

l108.title: To give and to receive are one in truth.

l110.title: I am as God created me.

l121.title: Forgiveness is the key to happiness.

l123.title: I thank my Father for His gifts to me.

l124.title: Let me remember I am one with God.

l125.title: In quiet I receive God’s Word today.

l126.title: All that I give is given to myself.

l127.title: There is no love but God’s.

l128.title: The world I see has nothing that I want.

l129.title: Beyond this world there is a world I want.

l130.title: It is impossible to see two worlds.

l131.title: No-one can fail who asks to reach the truth.

l132.title: I loose the world from all I thought it was.

l133.title: I will not value what is valueless.

l134.title: Let me perceive forgiveness as it is.

l135.title: If I defend myself I am attacked.

l136.title: Sickness is a defense against the truth.

l137.title: When I am healed I am not healed alone.

l138.title: Heaven is the decision I must make.

l139.title: I will accept Atonement for myself.

l140.title: Only salvation can be said to cure.

l151.title: All things are echoes of the Voice of God.

l152.title: The power of decision is my own.

l153.title: In my defenselessness my safety lies.

l154.title: I am among the ministers of God.

l155.title: I will step back and let Him lead the way.

l156.title: I walk with God in perfect holiness.

l157.title: Into His Presence would I enter now.

l158.title: Today I learn to give as I receive.

l159.title: I give the miracles I have received.

l160.title: I am at home. Fear is the stranger here.

l161.title: Give me your blessing, holy Son of God.

l162.title: I am as God created me.

l163.title: There is no death. The Son of God is free.

l164.title: Now are we One with Him Who is our Source.

l165.title: Let not my mind deny the Thought of God.

l166.title: I am entrusted with the gifts of God.

l167.title: There is one life, and that I share with God.

l168.title: Your grace is given me. I claim it now.

l169.title: By grace I live. By grace I am released.

l170.title: There is no cruelty in God and none in me.

l181.title: I trust my brothers, who are one with me.

l182.title: I will be still an instant and go home.

l183.title: I call upon God’s Name and on my own.

l184.title: The Name of God is my inheritance.

l185.title: I want the peace of God.

l186.title: Salvation of the world depends on me.

l187.title: I bless the world because I bless myself.

l188.title: The peace of God is shining in me now.

l189.title: I feel the Love of God within me now.

l190.title: I choose the joy of God instead of pain.

l191.title: I am the holy Son of God Himself.

l192.title: I have a function God would have me fill.

l193.title: All things are lessons God would have me learn.

l194.title: I place the future in the Hands of God.

l195.title: Love is the way I walk in gratitude.

l196.title: It can be but myself I crucify.

l197.title: It can be but my gratitude I earn.

l199.title: I am not a body. I am free.

l200.title: There is no peace except the peace of God.

l221.title: Peace to my mind. Let all my thoughts be still.

l222.title: God is with me. I live and breathe in Him.

l223.title: God is my life. I have no life but His.

l224.title: God is my Father, and He loves His Son.

l225.title: God is my Father, and His Son loves Him.

l226.title: My home awaits me. I will hasten there.

l227.title: This is my holy instant of release.

l228.title: God has condemned me not. No more do I.

l229.title: Love, Which created me, is what I am.

l230.title: Now will I seek and find the peace of God.

l231.title: Father, I will but to remember You.

l232.title: Be in my mind, my Father, through the day.

l233.title: I give my life to God to run today.

l234.title: Father, today I am Your Son again.

l235.title: God in His mercy wills that I be saved.

l236.title: I rule my mind, which I alone must rule.

l237.title: Now would I be as God created me.

l238.title: On my decision all salvation rests.

l239.title: The glory of my Father is my own.

l240.title: Fear is not justified in any form.

l241.title: This holy instant is salvation come.

l242.title: This day is God’s. It is my gift to Him.

l243.title: Today I will judge nothing that occurs.

l244.title: I am in danger nowhere in the world.

l245.title: Your peace is with me, Father. I am safe.

l246.title: To love my Father is to love His Son.

l247.title: Without forgiveness I will still be blind.

l248.title: Whatever suffers is not part of me.

l249.title: Forgiveness ends all suffering and loss.

l250.title: Let me not see myself as limited.

l251.title: I am in need of nothing but the truth.

l252.title: The Son of God is my identity.

l253.title: My Self is ruler of the universe.

l254.title: Let every voice but God’s be still in me.

l255.title: This day I choose to spend in perfect peace.

l256.title: God is the only goal I have today.

l257.title: Let me remember what my purpose is.

l258.title: Let me remember that my goal is God.

l259.title: Let me remember that there is no sin.

l260.title: Let me remember God created me.

l261.title: God is my refuge and my security.

l262.title: Let me perceive no differences today.

l263.title: My holy vision sees all things as pure.

l264.title: I am surrounded by the Love of God.

l265.title: Creation’s gentleness is all I see.

l266.title: My holy Self abides in you, God’s Son.

l267.title: My heart is beating in the peace of God.

l268.title: Let all things be exactly as they are.

l269.title: My sight goes forth to look upon Christ’s face.

l270.title: I will not use the body’s eyes today.

l271.title: Christ’s is the vision I will use today.

l272.title: How can illusions satisfy God’s Son?

l273.title: The stillness of the peace of God is mine.

l274.title: Today belongs to Love. Let me not fear.

l275.title: God’s healing Voice protects all things today.

l276.title: The Word of God is given me to speak.

l277.title: Let me not bind Your Son with laws I made.

l278.title: If I am bound, my Father is not free.

l280.title: What limits can I lay upon God’s Son?

l281.title: I can be hurt by nothing but my thoughts.

l282.title: I will not be afraid of love today.

l283.title: My true Identity abides in You.

l284.title: I can elect to change all thoughts that hurt.

l285.title: My holiness shines bright and clear today.

l286.title: The hush of Heaven holds my heart today.

l287.title: You are my goal, my Father. Only You.

l288.title: Let me forget my brother’s past today.

l289.title: The past is over. It can touch me not.

l290.title: My present happiness is all I see.

l291.title: This is a day of stillness and of peace.

l292.title: A happy outcome to all things is sure.

l293.title: All fear is past, and only love is here.

l294.title: My body is a wholly neutral thing.

l295.title: The Holy Spirit looks through me today.

l296.title: The Holy Spirit speaks through me today.

l297.title: Forgiveness is the only gift I give.

l298.title: I love You, Father, and I love Your Son.

l300.title: Only an instant does this world endure.

l301.title: And God Himself shall wipe away all tears.

l302.title: Where darkness was I look upon the light.

l303.title: The holy Christ is born in me today.

l304.title: Let not my world obscure the sight of Christ.

l305.title: There is a peace that Christ bestows on us.

l306.title: The gift of Christ is all I seek today.

l307.title: Conflicting wishes cannot be my will.

l308.title: This instant is the only time there is.

l309.title: I will not fear to look within today.

l310.title: In fearlessness and love I spend today.

l311.title: I judge all things as I would have them be.

l312.title: I see all things as I would have them be.

l313.title: Now let a new perception come to me.

l314.title: I seek a future different from the past.

l315.title: All gifts my brothers give belong to me.

l316.title: All gifts I give my brothers are my own.

l317.title: I follow in the way appointed me.

l318.title: In me salvation’s means and end are one.

l319.title: I came for the salvation of the world.

l320.title: My Father gives all power unto me.

l321.title: Father, my freedom is in You alone.

l322.title: I can give up but what was never real.

l323.title: I gladly make the ‘sacrifice’ of fear.

l324.title: I merely follow, for I would not lead.

l325.title: All things I think I see reflect ideas.

l326.title: I am forever an Effect of God.

l327.title: I need but call and You will answer me.

l328.title: I choose the second place to gain the first.

l329.title: I have already chosen what You will.

l330.title: I will not hurt myself again today.

l331.title: There is no conflict, for my will is Yours.

l332.title: Fear binds the world. Forgiveness sets it free.

l333.title: Forgiveness ends the dream of conflict here.

l334.title: Today I claim the gifts forgiveness gives.

l335.title: I choose to see my brother’s sinlessness.

l336.title: Forgiveness lets me know that minds are joined.

l337.title: My sinlessness protects me from all harm.

l338.title: I am affected only by my thoughts.

l339.title: I will receive whatever I request.

l340.title: I can be free of suffering today.

l341.title:
I can attack but my own sinlessness,
  And it is only that which keeps me safe.

l342.title:
I let forgiveness rest upon all things,
  For thus forgiveness will be given me.

l343.title:
I am not asked to make a sacrifice
  To find the mercy and the peace of God.

l344.title:
Today I learn the law of love; that what
  I give my brother is my gift to me.

l345.title:
I offer only miracles today,
  For I would have them be returned to me.

l346.title:
Today the peace of God envelops me,
  And I forget all things except His Love.

l347.title:
Anger must come from judgement. Judgement is
  The weapon I would use against myself
  To keep all miracles away from me.

l348.title:
I have no cause for anger or for fear,
  For You surround me. And in every need
  That I perceive Your grace suffices me.

l349.title:
Today I let Christ’s vision look upon
  All things for me and judge them not, but give
  Each one a miracle of love instead.

l350.title:
Miracles mirror God’s eternal Love.
  To offer them is to remember Him,
  And through His memory to save the world.

l351.title:
My sinless brother is my guide to peace.
  My sinful brother is my guide to pain.
  And which I choose to see I will behold.

l352.title:
Judgement and love are opposites. From one
  Come all the sorrows of the world. But from
  The Other comes the peace of God Himself.

l353.title:
My eyes, my tongue, my hands, my feet today
  Have but one purpose; to be given Christ
  To use to bless the world with miracles.

l354.title:
We stand together, Christ and I, in peace
  And certainty of purpose. And in Him
  Is His Creator, as He is in me.

l355.title:
There is no end to all the peace and joy
  And all the miracles that I will give
  When I accept God’s Word. Why not today?

l356.title:
Sickness is but another name for sin.
  Healing is but another Name for God.
  The miracle is thus a call to Him.

l357.title:
Truth answers every call we make to God,
  Responding first with miracles, and then
  Returning unto us to be Itself.

l358.title:
No call to God can be unheard nor left
  Unanswered. And of this I can be sure;
  His answer is the one I really want.

l359.title:
God’s answer is some form of peace.
  All pain Is healed; all misery replaced with joy.
  All prison doors are opened. And all sin
  Is understood as merely a mistake.

l360.title:
Peace be to me, the holy Son of God.
  Peace to my brother, who is one with me.
  Let all the world be blessed with peace through us.

l361.title:
This holy instant would I give to You.
  Be You in charge. For I would follow You,
  Certain that Your direction gives me peace.

l362.title:
This holy instant would I give to You.
  Be You in charge. For I would follow You,
  Certain that Your direction gives me peace.

l363.title:
This holy instant would I give to You.
  Be You in charge. For I would follow You,
  Certain that Your direction gives me peace.

l364.title:
This holy instant would I give to You.
  Be You in charge. For I would follow You,
  Certain that Your direction gives me peace.

l365.title:
This holy instant would I give to You.
  Be You in charge. For I would follow You,
  Certain that Your direction gives me peace.

l001.title: Nothing I see in this room means anything.

l002.title: “I have given everything I see all the meaning that it has for me.”

l003.title: “I do not understand anything I see in this room.”

l005.title: “I am never upset for the reason I think.”

l006.title: “I am upset because I see something that is not there.”

l008.title: My mind is preoccupied with past thoughts.

l009.title: “I see nothing as it is now.”

l011.title: “My meaningless thoughts are showing me a meaningless world.”

l012.title: “I am upset because I see a meaningless world.”

l014.title: “God did not create a meaningless world”

l015.title: My thoughts are images which I have made.

l018.title: “I am not alone in experiencing the effects of my seeing.”

l019.title: “I am not alone in experiencing the effects of my thoughts.”

l021.title: “I am determined to see things differently.”

l022.title: “What I see is a form of vengeance.”

l023.title: “I can escape from the world I see by giving up attack thoughts.”

l024.title: “I do not perceive my own best interests.”

l025.title: “I do not know what anything is for.”

l026.title: “My attack thoughts are attacking my invulnerability.”

l027.title: “Above all else I want to see.”

l028.title: “Above all else I want to see things differently.”

l030.title: “God is in everything I see because God is in my mind.”

l031.title: “I am not the victim of the world I see.”

l032.title: “I have invented the world I see.”

l033.title: “There is another way of looking at the world.”

l034.title: “I could see peace instead of this.”

l035.title: “My mind is part of God’s. I am very holy.”

l038.title: “There is nothing my holiness cannot do.”

l040.title: “I am blessed as a Son of God.”

l041.title: “God goes with me wherever I go.”

l042.title: “God is my strength. Vision is His gift.”

l043.title: “God is my Source. I cannot see apart from Him.”

l044.title: “God is the Light in which I see.”

l045.title: “God is the Mind with which I think.”

l046.title: “God is the Love in which I forgive.”

l047.title: “God is the Strength in which I trust.”

l049.title: “God’s Voice speaks to me all through the day.”

l050.title: “I am sustained by the Love of God.”

l061.title: I am the light of the world.

l062.title: Forgiveness is my function as the light of the world.

l063.title: The light of the world brings peace to every mind through my forgiveness.

l064.title: Let me not forget my function.

l065.title: My only function is the one God gave me.

l066.title: My happiness and my function are one.

l069.title: My grievances hide the light of the world in me.

l071.title: Only God’s plan for salvation will work.

l072.title: Holding grievances is an attack on God’s plan for salvation.

l074.title: There is no will but God’s.

l076.title: I am under no laws but God’s.

l079.title: Let me recognize the problem so it can be solved.

l080.title: Let me recognize my problems have been solved.

l092.title: Miracles are seen in light, and light and strength are one.

l093.title: Light and joy and peace abide in me.

l094.title: I am as God created me.

l095.title: I am One Self, united with my Creator.

l096.title: Salvation comes from my One Self.

l098.title: I will accept my part in God’s plan for salvation.

l099.title: Salvation is my only function here.

l100.title: My part is essential to God’s plan for salvation.

l101.title: God’s Will for me is perfect happiness.

l102.title: I share God’s Will for happiness for me.

l103.title: God, being Love, is also happiness.

l104.title: I seek but what belongs to me in truth.

l105.title: God’s peace and joy are mine.

l106.title: Let me be still and listen to the truth.

l107.title: Truth will correct all errors in my mind.

l108.title: To give and to receive are one in truth.

l110.title: I am as God created me.

l121.title: Forgiveness is the key to happiness.

l123.title: I thank my Father for His gifts to me.

l124.title: Let me remember I am one with God.

l125.title: In quiet I receive God’s Word today.

l126.title: All that I give is given to myself.

l127.title: There is no love but God’s.

l128.title: The world I see has nothing that I want.

l129.title: Beyond this world there is a world I want.

l130.title: It is impossible to see two worlds.

l131.title: No-one can fail who asks to reach the truth.

l132.title: I loose the world from all I thought it was.

l133.title: I will not value what is valueless.

l134.title: Let me perceive forgiveness as it is.

l135.title: If I defend myself I am attacked.

l136.title: Sickness is a defense against the truth.

l137.title: When I am healed I am not healed alone.

l138.title: Heaven is the decision I must make.

l139.title: I will accept Atonement for myself.

l140.title: Only salvation can be said to cure.

l151.title: All things are echoes of the Voice of God.

l152.title: The power of decision is my own.

l153.title: In my defenselessness my safety lies.

l154.title: I am among the ministers of God.

l155.title: I will step back and let Him lead the way.

l156.title: I walk with God in perfect holiness.

l157.title: Into His Presence would I enter now.

l158.title: Today I learn to give as I receive.

l159.title: I give the miracles I have received.

l160.title: I am at home. Fear is the stranger here.

l161.title: Give me your blessing, holy Son of God.

l162.title: I am as God created me.

l163.title: There is no death. The Son of God is free.

l164.title: Now are we One with Him Who is our Source.

l165.title: Let not my mind deny the Thought of God.

l166.title: I am entrusted with the gifts of God.

l167.title: There is one life, and that I share with God.

l168.title: Your grace is given me. I claim it now.

l169.title: By grace I live. By grace I am released.

l170.title: There is no cruelty in God and none in me.

l181.title: I trust my brothers, who are one with me.

l182.title: I will be still an instant and go home.

l183.title: I call upon God’s Name and on my own.

l184.title: The Name of God is my inheritance.

l185.title: I want the peace of God.

l186.title: Salvation of the world depends on me.

l187.title: I bless the world because I bless myself.

l188.title: The peace of God is shining in me now.

l189.title: I feel the Love of God within me now.

l190.title: I choose the joy of God instead of pain.

l191.title: I am the holy Son of God Himself.

l192.title: I have a function God would have me fill.

l193.title: All things are lessons God would have me learn.

l194.title: I place the future in the Hands of God.

l195.title: Love is the way I walk in gratitude.

l196.title: It can be but myself I crucify.

l197.title: It can be but my gratitude I earn.

l199.title: I am not a body. I am free.

l200.title: There is no peace except the peace of God.

l221.title: Peace to my mind. Let all my thoughts be still.

l222.title: God is with me. I live and breathe in Him.

l223.title: God is my life. I have no life but His.

l224.title: God is my Father, and He loves His Son.

l225.title: God is my Father, and His Son loves Him.

l226.title: My home awaits me. I will hasten there.

l227.title: This is my holy instant of release.

l228.title: God has condemned me not. No more do I.

l229.title: Love, Which created me, is what I am.

l230.title: Now will I seek and find the peace of God.

l231.title: Father, I will but to remember You.

l232.title: Be in my mind, my Father, through the day.

l233.title: I give my life to God to run today.

l234.title: Father, today I am Your Son again.

l235.title: God in His mercy wills that I be saved.

l236.title: I rule my mind, which I alone must rule.

l237.title: Now would I be as God created me.

l238.title: On my decision all salvation rests.

l239.title: The glory of my Father is my own.

l240.title: Fear is not justified in any form.

l241.title: This holy instant is salvation come.

l242.title: This day is God’s. It is my gift to Him.

l243.title: Today I will judge nothing that occurs.

l244.title: I am in danger nowhere in the world.

l245.title: Your peace is with me, Father. I am safe.

l246.title: To love my Father is to love His Son.

l247.title: Without forgiveness I will still be blind.

l248.title: Whatever suffers is not part of me.

l249.title: Forgiveness ends all suffering and loss.

l250.title: Let me not see myself as limited.

l251.title: I am in need of nothing but the truth.

l252.title: The Son of God is my identity.

l253.title: My Self is ruler of the universe.

l254.title: Let every voice but God’s be still in me.

l255.title: This day I choose to spend in perfect peace.

l256.title: God is the only goal I have today.

l257.title: Let me remember what my purpose is.

l258.title: Let me remember that my goal is God.

l259.title: Let me remember that there is no sin.

l260.title: Let me remember God created me.

l261.title: God is my refuge and my security.

l262.title: Let me perceive no differences today.

l263.title: My holy vision sees all things as pure.

l264.title: I am surrounded by the Love of God.

l265.title: Creation’s gentleness is all I see.

l266.title: My holy Self abides in you, God’s Son.

l267.title: My heart is beating in the peace of God.

l268.title: Let all things be exactly as they are.

l269.title: My sight goes forth to look upon Christ’s face.

l270.title: I will not use the body’s eyes today.

l271.title: Christ’s is the vision I will use today.

l272.title: How can illusions satisfy God’s Son?

l273.title: The stillness of the peace of God is mine.

l274.title: Today belongs to Love. Let me not fear.

l275.title: God’s healing Voice protects all things today.

l276.title: The Word of God is given me to speak.

l277.title: Let me not bind Your Son with laws I made.

l278.title: If I am bound, my Father is not free.

l280.title: What limits can I lay upon God’s Son?

l281.title: I can be hurt by nothing but my thoughts.

l282.title: I will not be afraid of love today.

l283.title: My true Identity abides in You.

l284.title: I can elect to change all thoughts that hurt.

l285.title: My holiness shines bright and clear today.

l286.title: The hush of Heaven holds my heart today.

l287.title: You are my goal, my Father. Only You.

l288.title: Let me forget my brother’s past today.

l289.title: The past is over. It can touch me not.

l290.title: My present happiness is all I see.

l291.title: This is a day of stillness and of peace.

l292.title: A happy outcome to all things is sure.

l293.title: All fear is past, and only love is here.

l294.title: My body is a wholly neutral thing.

l295.title: The Holy Spirit looks through me today.

l296.title: The Holy Spirit speaks through me today.

l297.title: Forgiveness is the only gift I give.

l298.title: I love You, Father, and I love Your Son.

l300.title: Only an instant does this world endure.

l301.title: And God Himself shall wipe away all tears.

l302.title: Where darkness was I look upon the light.

l303.title: The holy Christ is born in me today.

l304.title: Let not my world obscure the sight of Christ.

l305.title: There is a peace that Christ bestows on us.

l306.title: The gift of Christ is all I seek today.

l307.title: Conflicting wishes cannot be my will.

l308.title: This instant is the only time there is.

l309.title: I will not fear to look within today.

l310.title: In fearlessness and love I spend today.

l311.title: I judge all things as I would have them be.

l312.title: I see all things as I would have them be.

l313.title: Now let a new perception come to me.

l314.title: I seek a future different from the past.

l315.title: All gifts my brothers give belong to me.

l316.title: All gifts I give my brothers are my own.

l317.title: I follow in the way appointed me.

l318.title: In me salvation’s means and end are one.

l319.title: I came for the salvation of the world.

l320.title: My Father gives all power unto me.

l321.title: Father, my freedom is in You alone.

l322.title: I can give up but what was never real.

l323.title: I gladly make the ‘sacrifice’ of fear.

l324.title: I merely follow, for I would not lead.

l325.title: All things I think I see reflect ideas.

l326.title: I am forever an Effect of God.

l327.title: I need but call and You will answer me.

l328.title: I choose the second place to gain the first.

l329.title: I have already chosen what You will.

l330.title: I will not hurt myself again today.

l331.title: There is no conflict, for my will is Yours.

l332.title: Fear binds the world. Forgiveness sets it free.

l333.title: Forgiveness ends the dream of conflict here.

l334.title: Today I claim the gifts forgiveness gives.

l335.title: I choose to see my brother’s sinlessness.

l336.title: Forgiveness lets me know that minds are joined.

l337.title: My sinlessness protects me from all harm.

l338.title: I am affected only by my thoughts.

l339.title: I will receive whatever I request.

l340.title: I can be free of suffering today.

l341.title:
I can attack but my own sinlessness,
And it is only that which keeps me safe.

l342.title:
I let forgiveness rest upon all things,
For thus forgiveness will be given me.

l343.title:
I am not asked to make a sacrifice
To find the mercy and the peace of God.

l344.title:
Today I learn the law of love; that what
I give my brother is my gift to me.

l345.title:
I offer only miracles today,
For I would have them be returned to me.

l346.title:
Today the peace of God envelops me,
And I forget all things except His Love.

l347.title:
Anger must come from judgement. Judgement is
The weapon I would use against myself
To keep all miracles away from me.

l348.title:
I have no cause for anger or for fear,
For You surround me. And in every need
That I perceive Your grace suffices me.

l349.title:
Today I let Christ’s vision look upon
All things for me and judge them not, but give
Each one a miracle of love instead.

l350.title:
Miracles mirror God’s eternal Love.
To offer them is to remember Him,
And through His memory to save the world.

l351.title:
My sinless brother is my guide to peace.
My sinful brother is my guide to pain.
And which I choose to see I will behold.

l352.title:
Judgement and love are opposites. From one
Come all the sorrows of the world. But from
The Other comes the peace of God Himself.

l353.title:
My eyes, my tongue, my hands, my feet today
Have but one purpose; to be given Christ
To use to bless the world with miracles.

l354.title:
We stand together, Christ and I, in peace
And certainty of purpose. And in Him
Is His Creator, as He is in me.

l355.title:
There is no end to all the peace and joy
And all the miracles that I will give
When I accept God’s Word. Why not today?

l356.title:
Sickness is but another name for sin.
Healing is but another Name for God.
The miracle is thus a call to Him.

l357.title:
Truth answers every call we make to God,
Responding first with miracles, and then
Returning unto us to be Itself.

l358.title:
No call to God can be unheard nor left
Unanswered. And of this I can be sure;
His answer is the one I really want.

l359.title:
God’s answer is some form of peace.
All pain Is healed; all misery replaced with joy.
All prison doors are opened. And all sin
Is understood as merely a mistake.

l360.title:
Peace be to me, the holy Son of God.
Peace to my brother, who is one with me.
Let all the world be blessed with peace through us.

l361.title:
This holy instant would I give to You.
Be You in charge. For I would follow You,
Certain that Your direction gives me peace.
